title: Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus: A Systematic Approach
objectives: Understand the pathophysiology of Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus
Identify key diagnostic features of Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus
Apply clinical reasoning to Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus management
Recognize common pitfalls in Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus

sections.title: Overview of Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus
sections.content:
**Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus**

Normal midgut rotation, Ladd bands, midgut volvulus, upper GI series diagnosis

**Key Points:**
• Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA
• Malrotation: incomplete rotation → cecum in RUQ, duodenojejunal junction displaced
• Ladd bands: peritoneal bands crossing duodenum (cause obstruction)

sections.title: Pathophysiology & Key Features
sections.content:
• Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA
• Malrotation: incomplete rotation → cecum in RUQ, duodenojejunal junction displaced

sections.title: Diagnosis & Management
sections.content:
• Ladd bands: peritoneal bands crossing duodenum (cause obstruction)
• Volvulus: midgut twists around SMA → ischemia → necrosis (surgical EMERGENCY)
• Diagnosis: Upper GI series showing abnormal DJ junction position; Treatment: Ladd procedure

sections.title: Clinical Pearls
sections.content:
**High-Yield Points for Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus:**

• Ladd bands: peritoneal bands crossing duodenum (cause obstruction)
• Volvulus: midgut twists around SMA → ischemia → necrosis (surgical EMERGENCY)
• Diagnosis: Upper GI series showing abnormal DJ junction position; Treatment: Ladd procedure

mcqs.question: Which of the following is MOST characteristic of Intestinal Malrotation & Volvulus?

options.text: Requires invasive testing in all cases

correct.reinforcement: Correct! Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA.
correct.deeperWhy: Understanding this concept is foundational for clinical reasoning in this domain.
correct.clinicalPearl: Remember: Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA

coachDx.misconception: While typically self-resolving without treatment may seem plausible, it does not match the clinical scenario described.
coachDx.guidance: Review the key features that distinguish Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA from Typically self-resolving without treatment.
coachDx.bridgeTo: The key distinction involves Normal: 270° counterclockwise rotation around SMA.
